title: EB and CC have update - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will be displayed
scenario: Firmware update popup incorrectly redirects to Lens Desktop app for Charge Case update after Earbuds DFU completes
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Ensure both the Charge Case (CC) and Earbuds (EB) have a firmware update available.
4. Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
5. Locate and tap the firmware update notification or option for the Earbuds (EB).
6. Initiate and complete the Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Earbuds.
7. After the update completes, return to the Home screen.
8. Observe the popup displayed on the Home screen.
expected: The Earbuds firmware update completes successfully. Upon returning to the Home screen, a popup is displayed informing the user that the Lens Desktop app is needed to update the Charge Case.
